summary: Iteration 10 - Decision-Ready Features testing complete. All 25 backend tests passed. Creed 2 audit (134/134) verified. Frontend UI verified: Decision Panel with RunwayCard, ScenarioDeltaCard, DriversCard, VarianceInsightCard all visible and functional. Priority selector in FlowEditor working. Priority badge in Entry Log working.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 (recharts sizing issue) - cosmetic only, chart renders correctly

critical_code_review_comments: SSOT VERIFIED: All new endpoints (drivers, scenario-delta, runway, variance-summary) use same projection engine
Source tagging and priority are pure metadata - verified they do NOT affect projection calculations
Matrix rows correctly include priority field from backend
Decision Panel cards correctly display data from new endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test flows created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Decision-Ready features verified working: (1) SOURCE TAGGING - source_type (manual|deal) and source_id stored correctly, defaults to manual, pure metadata. (2) FLOW PRIORITY - critical|flexible|strategic stored/updated correctly, visible in Entry Log badge and matrix row, priority selector in FlowEditor with 4 buttons. (3) TOP DRIVERS - /api/projection/drivers returns negative_months with drivers array (max 3), aggregated by label, only negative contributors. (4) SCENARIO DELTA - /api/projection/scenario-delta returns per-month gap (likely - committed), total_gap_net. (5) CASH RUNWAY - /api/projection/runway returns committed/likely with months_until_breach, breach_month, is_safe. (6) VARIANCE SUMMARY - /api/variance-summary returns under/over/carried/written-off split. (7) CREED 2 - 134/134 tests pass, projection == matrix verified.

Frontend: Scenario Delta Card - shows gap total with sparkline

source_tagging.details: source_type (manual|deal) and source_id stored correctly. Defaults to manual. Pure metadata - does NOT affect projection.

flow_priority.details: critical|flexible|strategic stored and updated correctly. Priority selector in FlowEditor with 4 buttons. Priority badge visible in Entry Log. Priority dot visible in matrix row labels. Pure metadata - does NOT affect projection.

top_drivers.details: GET /api/projection/drivers returns negative_months array. Each month has drivers array sorted by absolute impact, max 3. Drivers aggregated by label. Only negative contributors included. DriversCard visible in Decision Panel.

scenario_delta.details: GET /api/projection/scenario-delta returns per-month gap (likely_balance - committed_balance). total_gap_net is sum of monthly gaps. ScenarioDeltaCard visible with sparkline.

cash_runway.details: GET /api/projection/runway returns committed and likely runway. Each has months_until_breach, breach_month, is_safe. RunwayCard visible with color-coded urgency.

variance_summary.details: GET /api/variance-summary returns total_underperformance, total_overperformance, net_variance_impact, total_carried_forward, total_written_off. VarianceInsightCard visible in Decision Panel.

creed_2_compliance.details: 134/134 Creed 2 audit tests pass. Projection == Matrix == P&L verified. No drift after all changes.
